description: Adhesively bonded aerospace panel cutaway: ~1mm face skin over dark adhesive bondline over thick doubler (left), same skin continuing over honeycomb core with adhesive fillets (right). Three flat parallel defects — DISBOND at skin-adhesive interface, VOID lens inside adhesive, CORE SEP where skin lifts off the fillet line. Dashed depth guides + known-depth ticks, then 0-degree straight-beam probe lands and its vertical beam strikes the disbond square.
